   Select model
   Switch between Claude models. Your pick becomes the default for new sessions. For other/previous model names,
   specify with --model.

     1. Default (recommended)  Use the default model
   > 2. Opus                   Most capable model
     3. Sonnet                 Balanced model
     4. Haiku                  Fastest model

   ● High effort (default) ←/→ to adjust

   Enter to set as default · s to use this session only · Esc to cancel
